services.name: api
services.role: Operational telemetry and seeded dashboard data

services.name: code-search
services.role: Hybrid lexical and semantic search over local corpus

flows: UI requests telemetry from the API for dashboards, infra, security, and backlog views.
UI writes and reads prompts through the prompt-library service with persistent storage.
Code-search indexes local corpus files into SQLite and optionally requests embeddings from Ollama.
Docker Compose wires all services onto one internal network for a self-hosted developer workflow.
